name: Sweet & Sour Red Squash with Mint
recipeIngredient: 4 Cloves garlic, peeled and lightly crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash into 3-inch-wide lengths.
2. Use a vegetable peeler to remove the peel.
3. Cut each piece crosswise into slices about 1/4-inch thick.
4. In a medium sauté pan, heat olive oil over low heat.
5. Add garlic and cook until golden brown; discard garlic.
6. Cook squash slices in batches on both sides until golden brown and tender but still holding shape.
7. Transfer cooked slices to a platter.
8. Sprinkle chopped mint over the squash.
9. In the pan, combine remaining olive oil with vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper; stir well.
10. Bring mixture to a boil and let it thicken slightly.
11. Pour hot liquid over squash slices; allow to cool.
This recipe should marinate for several hours before serving and lasts refrigerated for several days.
